info.title: Trading Journal + Prop Firm Simulator API
info.description: REST API for the Trading Journal & Prop Firm Challenge Simulator platform. All protected endpoints require Bearer JWT authentication. Financial values are returned as strings to preserve decimal precision.

BearerAuth.description: JWT access token obtained from POST /auth/login

error.example: email: must be a valid email address
error.description: Optional error detail string. Omitted when empty.

daily_pnl.description: Daily P&L array for bar chart

403Forbidden.description: Authenticated but not authorized to access this resource

example.error: You do not have access to this resource
email: must be a valid email address; password: must be at least 8 characters

template_id.description: If provided, rules are copied from template and the 'rules' field can be omitted

200.description: Simulation detail with rules and risk status

put.description: Only name and notes can be updated. Rules are immutable after first trade.

example.message: Simulation scheduled for deletion in 30 days

post.description: Adds a trade and triggers risk engine recalculation. Response includes updated simulation risk_status.

put.description: Full update of trade fields. Triggers risk engine recalculation.

400.description: File too large or unsupported format

example.error: File too large or unsupported format

get.description: Returns all data needed for the dashboard view: equity curve, daily PnL, calendar heatmap, statistics summary, and current risk status.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Time window for equity curve and daily PnL data

get.description: Returns performance breakdown by symbol, session, strategy, day of week, drawdown analysis, and streak data.
Returns all active system challenge templates for use when creating simulations.
